name: Brightvale Market Square
description: A crowded market square in the town of Brightvale. Thom's leather stall stands nearby, hung with belts and boots; a brazier smokes against the morning chill.

name: Brightvale North Gate
description: The town's timber gate stands open to the north road. A bored guard leans on a spear, watching carts trundle past.

exits.label: west along the stream to the old mill

name: The Old Mill
description: A ruined mill on the stream west of town, its wheel long seized. Locals say wolves den in the undercroft and come out hungry after dark.

exits.label: east along the stream to the gate

encounters.briefing: The pack pours out of the undercroft — low shapes cutting between the ruined beams, circling to block the path back east.
